title: Usopp and Chopper Are Cornered
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on usopp and chopper are cornered, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Usopp and Chopper Are Cornered. Usopp and Chopper face Mr. 4 and Miss Merry Christmas, turning fear and teamwork into a real battle. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: Hold down the cannonballs! We can't have them rolling all over the place!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There's 2 million angry rebels storming this way.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We should expect the ground to rumble this much at least.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's fine, Carue. You don't need to stay here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well, don't expect me to take responsibility even if you get trampled!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please listen to what I have to say!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Stick together men! We'll break through the southern gates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Once we're in the city grounds, the other gates will fall easily!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Listen to what I have to say!

summary: This part develops usopp and chopper are cornered and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
